sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115661" key="yhfoqesmi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψηφο-θεσμία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laying of a mosaic pavement, Inscr. gr. et lat. de la Syrie</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg004:1:168" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.168</biblScope> </bibl> (Nicopolis, <date TEIform="date">ii/iii A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
